biography.content: Hi there! Welcome to my profile. I'm a researcher with a Master’s in Pharmaceutical Sciences, passionate about using AI and machine learning to drive drug discovery. Currently, I work in academic publishing as a Data Analyst & AI Automation Lead, where I stay connected to cutting-edge research and analytics across the STEM landscape. I hope you enjoy my work. Take a look at my papers, and maybe we can collaborate sometime!
